title: hy(pixel)
description: a hypixel modpack with some useful fully client side tweaks, mainly for skyblock
body:
High(Pixel) Version: v1.1a or higher A lightweight client-side modpack designed for enhanced gameplay. It offers improved performance, visual polish, with a fully client side pack not just for highpixel but can be used on other vanila 1.21.8 servers as well. Perfect for players who want a better client that’s simply better.
Some of the Mods Major Mods: Reactive Music (optional) Flashback or Replay Mod (optional, 1.2 or higher) Ambient Sounds Soundum Improved 3rd Person Particular Particle Rain Litematica Better Clouds Distant Horizons Sound Physics Remastered Smooth Inventory Movement …and many more!
________________________________________________________________________________________________ Use v1.1a or higher if you want it to work I recomend adding cool rain ________________________________________________________________________________________________
more mods Notable Included Mods: AmbientSounds • AppleSkin • Architectury • Auto Clicker • AutoJump Fix • Bad Packets • Better Clouds • ClientSort • Cloth Config • Controlify • CreativeCore • Distant Horizons • Drip Sounds • Dynamic FPS • EssentialGUI • Fabric API • FerriteCore • Flashback • Freecam • GeckoLib 5 • GPU Tape • HD Skins • ImmediatelyFast • ImmersiveUI • Iris • Litematica • Litematica Printer • MaLiLib • Minescript • Mod Menu • No Report Button • Not Enough Crashes • Particle Rain • Particular Reforged • Pick Up Notifier • Presence Footsteps • Projectiles Trajectory Prediction • Reactive Music • Replay Mod • Shoulder Surfing Reloaded • Smooth Swapping • Sodium • Sodium Extra • Sound Physics Remastered • Sounds • Tooltip Scroll • TweakerMore • Tweakeroo • Visuality • Wakes • WorldEdit • Xaero’s Minimap • Xaero’s World Map • XaeroPlus • WTHIT ________________________________________________________________________________________________ v1.3 and Above – New Additions AutoFishingDeluxe CICADA FastBoot FirstPerson Keybind Fix Plus LambDynamicLights Mouse Tweaks NotEnoughAnimations PickUpTools Show Me Your Skin! YOSBR
https://modrinth.com/mod/voxy
